# AgentLighthouse

AgentLighthouse is Lighthouse for AI agents: a deterministic, local-first scanner for agent-readiness.

## Key Links

- [README](README.md)
- [Project Brief](docs/PROJECT_BRIEF.md)
- [Product Spec](docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md)
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [Scoring Model](docs/SCORING_MODEL.md)
- [Development Guide](docs/DEVELOPMENT.md)
- [CI Usage](docs/CI.md)
- [Validation Guide](docs/VALIDATION.md)
- [Roadmap](docs/ROADMAP.md)
- [Decisions](docs/DECISIONS.md)
- [Agent Instructions](AGENTS.md)
- [Claude Memory](CLAUDE.md)
- [Core Package](packages/core/src/index.ts)
- [CLI Package](packages/cli/src/index.ts)
- [Good Sample Project](examples/sample-good-project/README.md)

## Example Usage

- Scan sample project: `pnpm --filter @agentlighthouse/cli dev scan examples/sample-project`
- Scan this repo: `pnpm --filter @agentlighthouse/cli dev scan .`
- Generate starter files safely: `pnpm --filter @agentlighthouse/cli dev init . --dry-run`
